issue.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html
A newer version of `compileSdk` than 36 is available: 37
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2026.02.00 is available: 2026.05.00
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-compose than 2.9.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-compose than 2.9.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-navigation3 than 2.9.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.navigation3:navigation3-runtime than 1.0.0 is available: 1.1.1
A newer version of androidx.navigation3:navigation3-ui than 1.0.0 is available: 1.1.1
A newer version of com.google.android.gms:play-services-auth than 21.3.0 is available: 21.5.1
A newer version of org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter-api than 5.11.4 is available: 6.0.3
A newer version of org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter-engine than 5.11.4 is available: 6.0.3
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json than 1.10.0 is available: 1.11.0

issue.errorLine1: <string name="preference_use_vibration_scan">Use a vibration response when scanning medication codes</string>
<string name="preference_use_alarm_clock">Use alarm clock instead of notifications</string>
<string name="text_intake_sure_to_intake_all">Are you sure that you are taking all medications at the moment?</string>
<string name="intake_extra_desc_cancellable">Notification will be canceled automatically after 10 minutes</string>
<string name="intake_extra_desc_fullscreen">An intent to launch instead of posting the notification to the status bar on locked screen</string>
<string name="intake_extra_desc_no_sound">Silences notification, regardless of the sounds or vibrations</string>
<string name="intake_extra_desc_prealarm">A reminder will be sent 30 minutes before the regular schedule</string>
<string name="manual_add">Would you like to add the medication manually?</string>
<string name="text_clear_app_cache_description">This action will delete the application cache, as well as no longer used medication photos</string>
<string name="text_confirm_deletion_int">Are you sure you want to delete this intake?</string>
<string name="text_confirm_deletion_med">Are you sure you want to delete this medication?</string>
<string name="text_confirm_schedule_to_taken">Do you confirm that you have already taken "%1$s" on %2$s at %3$s?</string>
<string name="text_data_in_cloud_desc">There is data detected in the cloud. What would you like to do?</string>
<string name="text_duplicate">This medication has been already added!</string>
<string name="text_error_not_medicine">This label code is not from a medication!</string>
<string name="text_exit_app">Are you sure you want to exit the app?</string>
<string name="text_exit_cloud_desc">Do you confirm that you would like to exit the cloud account?</string>
<string name="text_fix_notifications">The application will restart and all overdue notifications will appear in the status bar. Do not use this function if everything works correctly!</string>
<string name="text_import_data_description">When importing, the selected data will be overwritten</string>
<string name="text_kit_list_is_empty">There are no groups found. You can add groups in the application settings.</string>
<string name="text_medicine_deleted">Medication has been deleted, it is impossible to change the intake status</string>
<string name="text_not_saved_intake">The intake is not saved! Would you like to go back?</string>
<string name="text_not_saved_medicine">The medicine is not saved! Would you like to go back?</string>
<string name="text_request_camera">To scan labels, the camera permission is necessary</string>
<string name="text_try_again">Try to scan the label again!</string>
<string name="text_toast_autostart_not_found">Autostart settings not found for this device</string>

<string name="text_explain_camera">To scan a label, you must grant the permission to use camera. The EAN-13 and DataMatrix codes are accepted. Below is an example of what they might look like (this only works for Russian medications)</string>
<string name="text_explain_disabled">The necessary permission is not granted</string>
<string name="text_explain_full_screen_intent">Allow full-screen notifications of intake to be displayed</string>
<string name="text_explain_ignore_battery">Allow an app to ignore battery optimizations. If not granted, notifications can be lost!</string>
<string name="text_explain_notifications">Allow to show all app notifications</string>
<string name="text_explain_reminders">Allow reminders to be set at a precise time</string>
<string name="text_explain_request_permissions">To receive notifications, you must grant the following permissions</string>
<string name="text_medicine_not_in_stock">You cannot take %1$s as there is not enough left!</string>
<string name="text_no_data_found">No medications found. Add them or change the filter.</string>
<string name="text_no_data_group_found">No medications with group found. Add them or change the filter.</string>
<string name="text_no_intakes_found">No intakes found. Add them via a medication\'s information card or change the search value.</string>
<string name="text_pick_cloud_service">Select a cloud provider to synchronize the application data (medications list and their images)</string>

issue.message: `checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
`checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
Very long vector path (8721 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
